chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1386 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi 21.02.2018. Mr. Masood Rasool Babar Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. M/s Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G and Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G alongwith Inspector Muhammad Taqi Liskani S.H.O P.S Salaro and ASI Juman Shah. Through this Constitutional Petition, the petitioner has assailed the legality and propriety of the order dated 21.04.2017 passed by the learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-I, Hala in Crime No. 05/2017 registered under section 147, 148, 149, 506, 504 PPC at P.S Salaro, District Matiari, whereby the learned Magistrate after hearing the parties disposed of the report submitted by the Investigating Officer of the case under section 173, Cr.P.C in “B” Class. After hearing the learned Counsel for the parties at some length, learned Counsel for the parties have agreed that the order dated 21.04.2017 for disposing of summary in “B” Class may be converted into “C” Class as, according to them, from the documents on record the case is made out for cancellation of F.I.R. in “C” Class. In view of above, the impugned order dated 21.04.2017, passed by the learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-I, Hala, whereby he has disposed of summary in “B” Class is converted into “C” Class. This petition stands disposed of in above terms. Office is directed to immediately send a copy of this order to the learned trial court for information and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
